DxButton.description: A versatile button component for triggering actions, submitting forms, and navigating via links. Supports multiple variants and sizes out of the box. Use the variant prop to control the visual style and the size prop to adjust dimensions. The ghost variant renders a transparent button suitable for toolbars. Design System Documentation
DxButton.import: import { DxButton } from 'my-design-system'; Also available in the slim build: import { DxButton } from 'my-design-system/slim';
DxButton.title: Dx Button
DxButton.deprecationNotice: Deprecated: DxButton will be removed in v4.0. Use DxActionButton instead, which supports the same API with improved accessibility and keyboard navigation.

label.description: Text displayed inside the button when no slot content is provided.

variant.description: Visual style variant. Use ghost for toolbar buttons and danger for destructive actions.

disabled.description: Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling.

href.description: When set, the button renders as an anchor element. Use for navigation actions.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible label for the button, used when the visible text is insufficient.

click.description: Emitted when the user clicks the button, presses Enter, or presses Space while focused.
